goals.description: Sprint through the final 0.6 of 'quick_chore' to claim total victory before my friends text and I have to fake it.
goals.rationale: I need that instant dopamine hit to silence the buzzing guilt about the term project. If I don't knock this out now, the stress will ruin my vibe for hanging out with cohort_3 later, and I can't handle the friction of explaining why I'm stressed.

goals.description: Send a vague, positive ping to cohort_3 within 45 minutes confirming we're still on for tonight, strictly avoiding any mention of my workload or panic.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) outweighs the looming deadline. They just want me there; they don't need to know I haven't started the real work. Keeping the illusion of stability is the only way to keep the peace without doing deep emotional labor.
